features.notes: package.ts registers the 'Monomers DB Provider' (monomerLibProvider role) and init; libraryProvider.ts implements DBLibraryProvider which backs the IMonomerLibProvider contract using listLibraries/getMonomersByLibrary queries.

Write operations live in queries/monomersApi.sql (upsertMonomer, upsertMonomerProperty, createLibrary). The only TS-side consumer is libraryProvider.ts (updateOrAddMonomersInLibrary calls api.queries.upsertMonomer).
The exported 'info' function in package.ts displays the package webRoot via grok.shell.info.
